text: Stepping through these bright, modern hallways into the vibrant R+D exhibit, I feel alert and inquisitive. The clean glass, minimalism, and the promise of new ideas spark my curiosity. Here in this space of research and development, accompanied by the soft hum of technology and the vivid colors on the wall, I am reminded that progress is both exciting and uncertain. How will we coexist with our new intelligent creations? I feel ready to reflect on the possibilities.
